servinfo.title: Idle Speed and IAC Throttle Valve Opening Inspection
servinfo.ptxt: Before idle speed check, make sure of the following.

item.ptxt: Lead wires and hoses of electronic fuel injection and engine and emission control systems are connected securely.
Valve lash is checked according to maintenance schedule.
All electrical systems (wipers, heater, lights, A/C, etc.) are out of service.
Air cleaner has been properly installed and is in good condition.
There are no air abnormally drawn in from air intake system.
There are no obstruction in PCV valve or its hoses.
There are no DTCs in ECM.
The following items are turned OFF as checked using “Data List” mode on SUZUKI scan tool.

servinfo.ptxt: After confirming all items, check idle speed and IAC throttle opening as follows.

attention3.ptxt: Before starting engine, place gearshift lever in “Neutral” (M/T model) or select lever in “P” range (A/T model), apply parking brake and block drive wheels.

s1.ptxt: With ignition “OFF”, connect SUZUKI scan tool to DLC (1).
Warm up engine to normal operating temperature.
Check engine idle speed and “IAC throttle opening” using “Data List” mode on SUZUKI scan tool.
If check result is out of specification, check engine idle speed referring to “Improper engine idling or engine fails to idle” under Engine Symptom Diagnosis .
